description_long: This cabin features a steeply pitched gable roof clad in gray shingles, giving it a traditional and weathered appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a muted blue-gray material, likely wood or composite siding, with dark trim around the windows and doors. The structure includes several windows of varying sizes: two small square windows and a pair of larger, diamond-paned windows on one gable end, and rectangular windows on the longer sides. The main entrance is a single door with a diamond-patterned glass panel, located on the gable end beneath the smaller windows. The overall design is compact and functional, with no visible porch or overhanging eaves. The cabin's style and materials suggest a rustic yet urban-adapted dwelling suitable for residential neighborhoods or parks.
description: A compact, rustic cabin with a steep gable roof, blue-gray siding, and multiple dark-trimmed windows. The main entrance is a single door with a diamond-patterned glass panel, and the structure lacks a porch.
description_view_0: The view shows the broad side of the cabin with a large rectangular window and the shingled gable roof dominating the scene.
description_view_1: This view highlights the gable end with two small square windows above, a pair of diamond-paned windows, and the main entrance door beneath them.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side is visible, featuring two rectangular windows with dark trim and the continuous shingled roof above.
description_view_3: This angle shows the other gable end with two small square windows above, a single diamond-paned window, and the main entrance door offset to one side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, covered in gray asphalt shingles, no visible dormers or overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with two small square windows and two diamond-paned windows on one gable end, two rectangular windows on one long side, and a single rectangular window on the opposite gable end; windows are grouped and vary in size and shape
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the gable end beneath the small square windows, offset to one side
